summary:
The working time of alginate impression material begins just after it develops visible elasticity, corresponding to the initiation of gelation upon consumption of trisodium phosphate. Clinically, this marks the earliest safe period for manipulation before the material sets irreversibly.  
\boxed{B}

Clinically, this marks the earliest safe period for manipulation before the material sets irreversibly.  
\boxed{B}. Answer choice: B
